case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PHILIDELPHIA REINSURANCE CORP

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PHILIDELPHIA REINSURANCE CORP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILIDELPHIA REINSURANCE CORP $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,450.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY (PAYMENT FROM CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO)
